news.headline: Spectral Capital appoints Aaron Christensen as Chief Revenue Officer to lead global expansion of Vogon Cloud Solutions.
news.summary: Seattle-based Spectral Capital, a leading provider of deep quantum technology, has recently appointed Aaron Christensen as its new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Christensen will be responsible for leading the company's efforts in global commercialization and driving revenue growth. This announcement was made on January 10, 2025, by the company, which trades on the OTCQB under the symbol FCCN. This move aims to strengthen Spectral Capital's position in the market and facilitate its expansion strategies.

news.headline: A US treasury statement detailing new sanctions against Russian oil to be announced later on Friday is helping to boost oil prices - Two oil trade sources
Amundi: We bought gilts for global portfolios as yields are more attractive and UK spending cuts are likely
Y-mAbs names Doug Gentilcore as Head of DANYELZA Business Unit, a biopharmaceutical company specializing in cancer treatment.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Y-mAbs Therapeutics, Inc. appointed Doug Gentilcore as the Senior Vice President, Head of the DANYELZA Business Unit. Y-mAbs is a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol YMAB, specializing in radioimmunotherapy and antibody-based cancer treatments. Doug Gentilcore's new role will involve leading the DANYELZA Business Unit within the company.

news.headline: Thai officials confiscate 1,000 Bitcoin miners after power theft. Miners altered PEA power meter to run machines illegally.
news.summary: It has been reported that miners altered the power meter of the Provincial Electricity Authority (PEA) in the area, diverting electricity for their equipment.

news.headline: In 2024, crypto losses exceeded $3B, while $488.5M of stolen assets were reclaimed, down by 27.62% from 2023's $674.9M.
news.summary: Approximately $488.5 million in stolen cryptocurrency assets were successfully retrieved, marking a decrease of 27.62% compared to the $674.9 million recovered in the previous year.

news.headline: Crypto Large Cap Fund by Grayscale now composed of 90% Bitcoin and Ethereum after a rebalance.
news.summary: In recent days, the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has significantly increased by over 15,000, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 300,000. This surge in cases has led to a sharp rise in hospitalizations, with more than 2,000 individuals currently being treated for the virus. Additionally, the death toll has risen to over 4,500 as a result of the recent spike in cases. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Boost your Zoo game airdrop with free animal feed. Check the daily riddle and rebus solutions for Jan 9.
news.summary: Acquire complimentary animal feed to enhance your Zoo game rewards. Access today's solutions for the daily riddle and rebus puzzles on Thursday, January 9th.

news.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum hit 2025 lows after investors exit ETFs, causing prices to drop significantly.
news.summary: On Wednesday, investors showed a significant disinterest in the Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, causing both cryptocurrencies to experience a sharp decline in value. As a result, Bitcoin plummeted to its lowest price point since 2025, while Ethereum also hit its lowest price level of the year. The sudden exodus of investors led to a notable drop in the prices of these two popular cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Ripple CEO meets Trump; XRP beats Bitcoin in 24 hrs. Expect XRP ETFs soon.
news.summary: Over the last day, XRP has shown better performance compared to Bitcoin. This coincided with a meeting between Ripple executives and President-elect Donald Trump, where they expressed positivity about ETF prospects.

news.headline: Elon Musk retreats from $2 trillion Dogecoin pledge, citing ambitious goal.
news.summary: Elon Musk, co-head of the Department of Government Efficiency and well-known supporter of Dogecoin, acknowledged that achieving his goal of cutting costs by $2 trillion may be challenging.

news.headline: Coinbase gets CFTC subpoena for Polymarket data; company may share user info lawfully - Stay tuned for updates!
news.summary: The exchange stated that it might have to disclose user information to the government if requested through legal means.

news.headline: Dogecoin loses all 2025 gains as Bitcoin, Solana drop. Dogecoin falls 21% in 2 days along with Bitcoin and other cryptos.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw a sharp decline on Thursday, with Dogecoin plunging by 21% over a two-day period. Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies also experienced significant drops as the market continued to bear the brunt of the downturn.

news.headline: Deepfake porn scandal hits Sydney high school as student creates explicit images of female classmates using AI, prompting police probe.
news.summary: In Sydney, Australia, a student stands accused of using artificial intelligence technology to produce and circulate explicit deepfake images of female peers. This incident has raised alarms about the growing issue of AI misuse.

news.headline: New game 'The Machines Arena' not including crypto features, set to launch on Steam and PS5 from Ethereum gaming network Ronin.
news.summary: The Machines Arena, a popular game on the Ethereum gaming network Ronin, is set to expand its reach by launching on Steam and PlayStation 5. The move comes with significant modifications aimed at enhancing the gaming experience for users.

news.headline: $140K in crypto raised by family of deceased OpenAI whistleblower to probe his death, amid suspicion of foul play.
news.summary: An ex-employee of OpenAI, identified as Suchir Balaji, was discovered dead in November in what appears to be a case of suicide. However, his mother has raised suspicions of foul play surrounding his death.

news.headline: AI deepfakes causing confusion over Los Angeles fires; Hollywood sign not really burning.
news.summary: The Hollywood sign is not actually burning, despite recent deepfake AI videos causing confusion amid the Los Angeles wildfires. Numerous fabricated videos are spreading misinformation, emphasizing the need to verify sources during this critical time.

news.headline: Multiple top crypto firms contributed funds for events at Donald Trump's inauguration.
news.summary: Several prominent companies in the cryptocurrency industry have shown strong interest in sponsoring gatherings and festivities surrounding the upcoming inauguration of President-elect Donald Trump.

news.headline: Ira Auerbach, former Nasdaq Digital Assets Chief, to lead Offchain Labs' Tandem division in Ethereum scaling project.
news.summary: Ira Auerbach has been appointed as the head of Tandem division at Offchain Labs, a move that aims to infuse the Ethereum scaling project with expertise from the traditional finance sector.

news.headline: UK court stops search for $750M Bitcoin in dump; Judge denies Howells' $735M hard drive retrieval due to environmental concerns.
news.summary: Judge Keyser KC has rejected Howells' attempt to retrieve a Bitcoin hard drive worth $735 million that was buried in a landfill in Newport. The judge cited concerns over environmental hazards as the reason for dismissing the bid.

news.headline: Crypto-supporting President-Elect Trump's plea rejected by Supreme Court for halting sentencing in New York.
news.summary: On Thursday, the U.S. Supreme Court rejected a request by former President Trump to stop his criminal sentencing in New York. This decision comes as Trump faces legal challenges related to his business practices and financial dealings. The denial of the emergency appeal means that Trump's sentencing will proceed as scheduled. The Supreme Court's ruling maintains the legal process in New York, where Trump is facing multiple investigations. Trump's legal troubles continue to mount, with this latest development being a setback for the former president.

news.headline: Pump.fun is a platform for creating Solana tokens in one minute for free, leading to viral memes in 2024.
news.summary: Pump.fun enables individuals to generate Solana tokens within just one minute at no cost, leading to the creation of popular memes in 2024.

news.headline: BTC falls, altcoins drop 10%+, Silk Road BTC sale approved in US for $6.5bn. Market top concerns rise. CFTC chair candidates, crypto regulation talk, XRP, SOL, ETH, FTX woes. Thailand to test crypto payments in Phuket.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) continues its downward trend, with many alternative coins (altcoins) experiencing drops of over 10%. The United States has been approved to sell $6.5 billion worth of Bitcoin seized from the Silk Road marketplace. Exchange-traded funds (ETFs) for Bitcoin see the second-largest outflow of funds in history. An analyst named Ansem predicts a 75% chance that the market has reached its peak. Executives from Kraken and Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) are among those being considered for the position of chair at the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). A senator from Oklahoma introduces the BTC Freedom Act in legislation. The outgoing CFTC chair continues to advocate for further regulation of cryptocurrencies. Ripple CEO Garlinghouse meets with former President Trump. Ripple's stablecoin RLUSD is set to be listed on additional exchanges soon. Solana (SOL) incentivizes validators to test the Firedancer upgrade. Do Kwon's trial is scheduled for January 2026. The Ethereum Foundation sells 100 ETH. Managers overseeing the bankruptcy of FTX are accused of mishandling funds. Disputes arise over the sale of FTX Europe within the FTX bankruptcy estate. Thailand plans to launch a pilot program for accepting cryptocurrency payments in Phuket.

news.headline: Validator compromises in PoS blockchains can threaten security and user trust, highlighting importance of decentralization.
news.summary: Validators play a crucial role in Proof of Stake (PoS) blockchains by verifying transactions and securing the network. However, issues such as centralization and compromises can jeopardize their reliability, security, and the trust of users. It is important to address these concerns to ensure the integrity of the network and maintain trust in the system. Take, for example, PoS networks with an average of 100 validators each, prominent ones like Ethereum 2.0 has around 150,000 validators, while newer ones may have only a few hundred. This indicates the varying scale of validator networks within different PoS blockchains. By mitigating centralization and security risks, these networks can continue to function effectively and maintain user confidence in the system.

news.headline: Advanced materials in aerospace and defence market to exceed $20 billion in revenue by 2024 due to increased demand for lightweight solutions; ResearchAndMarkets.com report.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report titled "Advanced Materials in Aerospace and Defence Market Report 2024-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The global revenue forecast for the Advanced Materials in Aerospace and Defence Market is set to exceed a noteworthy milestone of US$20.0 billion by the year 2024. This comprehensive report is essential for top companies looking to explore new revenue opportunities and gain insights into the industry's fundamental workings. Businesses aiming for expansion and a better comprehension of the sector will find this report highly beneficial for their strategic planning.

news.headline: CNB Financial Corporation and ESSA Bancorp, Inc. are merging, creating a combined company with $8 billion in total assets.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, CNB Financial Corporation, the parent company of CNB Bank (Nasdaq: CCNE), and ESSA Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of ESSA Bank & Trust (Nasdaq: ESSA), revealed a definitive agreement for ESSA to merge with CNB and ESSA Bank to merge with CNB Bank. The merger is anticipated to create a combined entity with around $8 billion in total assets, $7 billion in total deposits, and $6 billion in total loans.

news.headline: Constellation Brands reports Q3 Fiscal 2025 results; earnings call on Jan. 10th at 10:30 a.m. ET, with CEO and CFO.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Rochester, New York, Constellation Brands, Inc. (NYSE: STZ), a prominent beverage alcohol company, released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. President and CEO Bill Newlands, along with CFO Garth Hankinson, will conduct a conference call on the same day at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and future outlook. To participate in the conference call or access a live webcast, individuals can visit ir.cbrands.com.

news.headline: ZenaTech's ZenaDrone seeks FAA Part 137 cert. for crop spraying. ZenaDrone 1000 can spray fertilizers, herbicides, pesticides. Also for wildfires.
news.summary: ZenaTech, Inc., a technology firm listed on Nasdaq as ZENA and on FSE as 49Q, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, revealed on Jan. 10, 2025, its subsidiary ZenaDrone's application for a Federal Aviation Authority (FAA) Part 137 certification. This certification, designated for "Agricultural Aircraft Operations," pertains to the usage of the ZenaDrone 1000 drone for spraying activities, including fertilizers, herbicides, and pesticides in agricultural settings. The company also aims to employ the drone's sprayer for combating wildfires. This move aligns with ZenaTech's strategy to deploy drone swarms for various commercial objectives, leveraging AI technology and Quantum Computing.

news.headline: Royalty Pharma (Nasdaq: RPRX) to discuss business performance at conference on Jan 14, 2025, 6:45pm ET.
news.summary: In New York on January 10, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) shared details of its business progress, highlighting recent achievements and offering insights into the upcoming year's expectations for Portfolio Receipts in 2024. Pablo Legorreta, the company's founder and CEO, is scheduled to delve into these developments on January 14, 2025, during a webcast presentation set for 6:45 p.m. Eastern Time / 3:45 p.m. Pacific Time, coinciding with the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

news.headline: Golconda Gold Ltd. appoints Vikram Kapoor to board after Nicholas Brodie's departure. - 94 characters
news.summary: A recent press release on January 10, 2025, disclosed that Golconda Gold Ltd. has welcomed Mr. Vikram Kapoor to its board of directors. This appointment comes following the departure of Nicholas Brodie, filling the vacant position. Golconda Gold, identified as "GG" on the TSX-V and "GGGOF" on the OTCQB, made this announcement with positivity.

news.headline: Absci and Owkin join forces to enhance AI drug discovery, utilizing novel AI target discovery and de novo design models to speed up therapy development.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Owkin and Absci to enhance the discovery and design of groundbreaking therapeutics. Owkin, known for its innovative AI target discovery and agentic AI capabilities, will be collaborating with Absci, a leader in AI de novo design models. This collaboration aims to expedite the development of new and potentially revolutionary therapeutics.

news.headline: Churchill Downs Inc. to reveal Q4 & full year 2024 financial results on Feb 19, 2025, & hold conference call on Feb 20, 2025 at 9 am ET.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - On January 10, 2025, Churchill Downs Incorporated (CDI) revealed their plan to unveil the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024. The figures are set to be publicized post-market closure on February 19, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call to delve into the quarterly performance is scheduled for February 20, 2025, at 9 a.m. ET. This discussion serves as a platform for stakeholders to analyze the financial standing of the company, facilitating insights into the strategic outlook for the future.

news.headline: Ranchero Gold Corp. settles debt with former CEO by issuing 1,136,666 shares at Cdn$0.06/share and 330,769 shares at Cdn$0.090697/share.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 10, 2025, Ranchero Gold Corp. (TSX.V:RNCH) successfully finalized a debt settlement with former CEO William Pincus. The settlement involved issuing 1,136,666 common shares at a price of Cdn$0.06 per share and 330,769 shares at Cdn$0.090697 per share for past services. Approval from disinterested shareholders and the TSX Venture Exchange was obtained for this transaction. The shares issued are bound by a hold period until May 11, 2025, as per applicable securities regulations.

news.headline: Dr. Paul M. Ridker joins Tourmaline's Cardiovascular Scientific Advisory Board, enhancing expertise.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 0.5% compared to the previous quarter. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 1.8 million, highlighting the impact of the ongoing economic challenges. Additionally, the labor force participation rate has also shown a slight decrease, falling to 62.4%. These figures underscore the need for targeted measures to address the rising unemployment and boost workforce participation in the country.

news.headline: Prairie Operating Co. finishes Shelduck South pad with 8 wells, aiming for full production by Q1 2025, part of 2025 dev plan.
news.summary: In Houston, Texas on January 10, 2025, Prairie Operating Co. (Nasdaq: PROP) shared their successful completion of the initial eight-well Shelduck South pad in the DJ Basin. The company is on track to begin full production in the first quarter of 2025. The Shelduck pad, in addition to the recent acquisition of Nickel Road Operating (NRO), marks the beginning stages of Prairie's 2025 development plan.

news.headline: Alphyn CEO presents at investor conferences during J.P. Morgan Healthcare Week in San Francisco.
news.summary: An announcement was made today by Alphyn, a dermatology company based in Annapolis, Maryland, regarding their CEO Neal Koller's participation in investor conferences at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Week in San Francisco. The company specializes in developing Multi-Target Therapeutics® and is currently in the clinical stage. The presentation is scheduled to take place on January 10, 2025, and is anticipated to showcase the company's innovative approach to dermatology. This event marks a significant opportunity for Alphyn to engage with potential investors and highlight their progress in the field.

news.headline: Net Lease Office Properties sells 5 properties for $43.3 million, repays $43 million mortgage.
news.summary: Net Lease Office Properties (NYSE: NLOP) disclosed the complete repayment of the J.P. Morgan Senior Secured Mortgage. This was achieved through the successful sale of five office properties in November and December, with total gross proceeds amounting to $43.3 million. The sale included primary tenants of these properties.

news.headline: Dow futures down ahead of jobs report. Taiwan Semiconductor reports strong sales, Tesla Model Y launched in China.
news.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor, a leading chipmaker, announced robust sales numbers. Meanwhile, Tesla introduced the new Model Y in China. Investors are closely monitoring the job report set to be released. Dow Jones futures have taken a dip in light of this imminent update. Notable focus also remains on Delta and Nvidia, reflecting the impact of these developments on market dynamics.

news.headline: Opera's CFO will speak at 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference, representing a major browser dev. and web consumer brand.
news.summary: Opera Limited, a prominent browser developer and popular internet consumer brand, revealed that Frode Jacobsen, the Chief Financial Officer, will be attending the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference. The event is set to take place in Oslo, Norway on January 10, 2025. Opera Limited is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OPRA. This development highlights the company's efforts to engage with the investment community, with Jacobsen representing the organization at this significant conference.

news.headline: 80% foreign respondents confident in China's development prospect per 1st international image survey. China's global impact growing amid worldwide changes.
news.summary: China's influence is rapidly growing as unprecedented changes occur globally. The impact of China is becoming more extensive, deep, and lasting than ever before. The world's focus on China has reached an unprecedented scale, showcasing the widespread interest in its developments.

news.headline: Delta Police, aided by Chainalysis, seize millions from scam wallets in Operation Spincaster to fight crypto fraud effectively.
news.summary: In a recent operation titled Spincaster, Delta Police, along with assistance from Chainalysis, successfully tracked down and froze millions of dollars from fraudulent wallets. This collaboration has significantly improved the crypto crime fighting abilities of local law enforcement.

news.headline: Closing weekend of DSF features X Factor grand finale on 12 Jan at Dubai Festival City Mall with performances by Majid Al Muhandis, Assala, and Majid Razavi. Unmissable show!
news.summary: Get ready for an exciting conclusion to X Factor on January 12 at DSF Nights at Dubai Festival City Mall, where the winner of the season will be announced. The event will feature live performances from renowned musicians Majid Al Muhandis, Assala, and Majid Razavi, promising to bring a vibrant atmosphere to the city. Don't miss this electrifying finale as the music industry's top talents showcase their skills.

news.headline: Constellation Energy acquiring Calpine due to increasing demand for electricity by tech, deal worth (important number)$.
news.summary: The purchase of Calpine by Constellation Energy is fueled by a rapidly increasing demand for electricity from the technology sector. This move reflects the growing need for energy as the technology industry expands.

news.headline: Rhythm Pharm reports $42M in Q4 net sales, $130M in 2024 sales; Phase 3 trial for setmelanotide planned by H1 2025.
news.summary: Unaudited preliminary net revenues from worldwide sales of IMCIVREE® (setmelanotide) totaled roughly $42 million in the fourth quarter of 2024 and approximately $130 million for the entire year. Additionally, the company is progressing as planned to announce top-line results from the global Phase 3 trial investigating setmelanotide in acquired hypothalamic obesity by the first half of 2025.

news.headline: Royalty Pharma acquires external manager and initiates $3 billion share repurchase program, aiming to boost shareholder value.
news.summary: In New York on January 10, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) revealed significant initiatives aimed at boosting shareholder value.

news.headline: U-Haul opens new center in Schofield, offers 569 climate-controlled storage units on 4.8-acre site.
news.summary: In Schofield, Wisconsin, U-Haul® has reopened its new location at 141 Grand Ave. The old store was demolished to make way for two modern buildings to better cater to the residents of Marathon County. The revamped U-Haul Moving & Storage of Wausau, situated on 4.8 acres, boasts a new three-story self-storage facility. This upgraded center offers access to a total of 569 indoor storage units that are both climate-controlled and heated, equipped with advanced security features. The storage units are available at competitive prices, enhancing convenience and accessibility for customers in the area.

news.headline: Cyvers' offchain validation could prevent 99% of crypto thefts, saving $2.3 billion from hacking and scams in 2024.
news.summary: Cyvers has developed a blockchain security solution that has the potential to significantly reduce crypto hacks and scams. This solution aims to prevent up to 99% of such incidents, which includes addressing vulnerabilities such as phishing attacks and CEX exploits. In 2024 alone, these types of cybercrimes cost a staggering $2.3 billion. With Cyvers' innovative security measures, the crypto community could see a much-needed increase in protection against malicious activities in the digital asset space.

news.headline: Global competition with $500,000+ prizes launched to find drugs for cancer target TBXT, aiming for breakthroughs.
news.summary: In Durham, North Carolina, on January 10, 2025, a recent announcement revealed a new international competition with prizes totaling more than $500,000. The primary objective of this competition is to drive innovations in drug discovery specifically targeting the cancerous cells associated with TBXT. This initiative seeks to incentivize breakthroughs in the field of cancer treatment and research.

news.headline: Cooler Master launched CH351: wireless gaming headset with 3D surround sound for total immersion.
news.summary: Cooler Master has unveiled the CH351 wireless gaming headset in Taipei, Taiwan. The headset boasts built-in 3D surround sound technology, aiming to revolutionize the audio experience for users. Whether engaging in gaming, working, watching movies, or listening to music, the CH351 promises to provide dynamic and immersive sound quality. This headset ensures seamless connectivity and delivers rich audio output, enhancing user experiences across various activities. The CH351 is a standout product in Cooler Master's portfolio, offering a new level of audio entertainment.

news.headline: Y-mAbs creates two business units to boost Radiopharmaceuticals Platform and enhance commercial potential of DANYELZA.
news.summary: A company has created two new business units to fast-track the development of its Radiopharmaceuticals Platform and enhance the commercial opportunities for DANYELZA. This strategic move aims to drive innovation and maximize the market potential of the company's products.
